one_time_description: Williams Treaty distribution to members recorded under Land Management segment
economic_notes: Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership gaming revenue received. Cottage and small business centre rentals noted. New subdivision construction underway financed by BMO construction line of credit. Williams Treaty settlement funds held in restricted surplus.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Large Williams Treaty settlement funds held in restricted accumulated surplus (~$44M combined). Williams Treaty distribution to members of $5,485,496 recorded as expense under Land Management causing large deficit in that segment. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Gaming revenue from Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership. Trust funds of $2,958,424 excluded from financial statements and reported separately. Flooding claims contingent liability noted. COVID-19 uncertainty note included.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
